results.title: AKRAM MUHAMMAD V. HONG KONG SAR GOVERNMENT
results.coram: Before: Hon Campbell-Moffat J in Court
results.parties: AKRAM MUHAMMAD Applicant and DIRECTOR OF IMMIGRATION 1st Putative Respondent SECRETARY FOR SECURITY 2nd Putative Respondent
results.representations: The applicant appeared in person Mr Michael Lok, Government Counsel, of the Department of Justice, for the putative respondents
